overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the status/badge slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Category binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Description binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (display)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns to show
overridableConfigKeys.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

overridableConfigKeys.label: Faceted filters
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cell spacing
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image label binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Buttons users can click on each row

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max inline row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Meta binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (fetch)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Price binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Priority binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search placeholder
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page-change event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when the user picks a new page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows per page used to derive total page count

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

filterBarLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the filter bar.

filters.description: Field, label, control type, and options for each filter input

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

assigneeBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the assignee/owner slot.

badgeBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the status/badge slot.

bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

categoryBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

descriptionBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

displayPageSize.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

fields.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

filters.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

gap.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

imageField.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

imageLabelBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

itemActions.description: Buttons users can click on each row

maxInlineActions.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

metaBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

pageSize.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

priceBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

priorityBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

titleBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-flag / FlagOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

categoryBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

descriptionBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

displayPageSize.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

fields.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

filters.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

gap.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

imageField.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

imageLabelBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

itemActions.description: Buttons users can click on each row

maxInlineActions.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

metaBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

pageSize.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

priceBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

priorityBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

titleBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

detailSlot.description: UI slot the modal renders into

fields.description: Entity fields displayed as inputs in the modal form

icon.description: Icon shown in the modal header

mode.description: create or edit — controls submit-button copy and validation

title.description: Heading at the top of the modal

events.name: CAL_CREATED
events.description: A new calendar entry has been created.

events.name: CAL_UPDATED
events.description: Signals a change or update to calendar data.

events.name: CAL_DELETED
events.description: Signals that a calendar item has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates a record has been modified and changes are pending.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / CalendarOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

contentTrait.description: Trait rendered inside the app layout content area

detailSlot.description: Slot where detail/edit views render

layoutMode.description: Where the primary navigation lives in the chrome

notificationClickEvent.description: Event emitted when the user picks a notification

notifications.description: Items shown in the notifications dropdown

searchEvent.description: Event emitted when the user runs a global search

topBarActions.description: Icon buttons shown on the right side of the top bar

events.name: CREATE
events.description: Signals the creation of a new record.

events.name: CONTACT_SEARCH
events.description: Triggers a search for contacts.

events.name: CONTACT_NOTIFICATIONS_OPEN
events.description: Indicates new contact notifications are available.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when the user submits a query

overridableConfigKeys.label: Placeholder text
overridableConfigKeys.description: Hint text shown inside the empty search input

overridableConfigKeys.label: Filter event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when the user changes a filter selection

overridableConfigKeys.label: Filter bar look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the filter bar.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Filter controls
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field, label, control type, and options for each filter input

overridableConfigKeys.label: Assignee binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the assignee/owner slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Badge binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the status/badge slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Category binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Description binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (display)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns to show
overridableConfigKeys.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

overridableConfigKeys.label: Faceted filters
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cell spacing
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image label binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Buttons users can click on each row

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max inline row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Meta binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (fetch)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Price binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Priority binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search placeholder
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

events.name: CONTACT_CREATED
events.description: Signals the creation of a new contact record.
events.synonyms: new contact, add contact, contact added

events.name: CONTACT_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that a contact's details have been modified.

events.name: CONTACT_DELETED
events.description: Signals a contact record has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates data has been modified and needs to be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / ContactOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

appName.description: Product name shown in the chrome header

contentTrait.description: Trait rendered inside the app layout content area

detailSlot.description: Slot where detail/edit views render

layoutMode.description: Where the primary navigation lives in the chrome

layoutPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the application chrome

navItems.description: Top-level nav entries on the left rail

notificationClickEvent.description: Event emitted when the user picks a notification

notifications.description: Items shown in the notifications dropdown

searchEvent.description: Event emitted when the user runs a global search

topBarActions.description: Icon buttons shown on the right side of the top bar

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

events.name: FEED_CREATED
events.description: A new feed item has been created.

events.name: FEED_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that the feed data has been refreshed or modified.

events.name: FEED_DELETED
events.description: Signals a feed item has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates data has been modified and requires synchronization.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / FeedOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

appName.description: Product name shown in the chrome header

contentTrait.description: Trait rendered inside the app layout content area

detailSlot.description: Slot where detail/edit views render

layoutMode.description: Where the primary navigation lives in the chrome

layoutPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the application chrome

navItems.description: Top-level nav entries on the left rail

notificationClickEvent.description: Event emitted when the user picks a notification

notifications.description: Items shown in the notifications dropdown

searchEvent.description: Event emitted when the user runs a global search

topBarActions.description: Icon buttons shown on the right side of the top bar

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

event.description: Event emitted when the user picks a new page

pageSize.description: Rows per page used to derive total page count

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

assigneeBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the assignee/owner slot.

badgeBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the status/badge slot.

bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

categoryBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

descriptionBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

displayPageSize.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

fields.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

filters.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

gap.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

imageField.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

imageLabelBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

itemActions.description: Buttons users can click on each row

maxInlineActions.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

metaBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

pageSize.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

priceBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

priorityBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

titleBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Signals that data has been modified and should be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

metaBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

pageSize.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

priceBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

priorityBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

titleBinding.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

mode.description: create or edit — controls submit-button copy and validation

title.description: Heading at the top of the modal

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Faceted filters

events.name: NOTE_CREATED
events.description: A new note has been created.

events.name: NOTE_UPDATED
events.description: Signals that a note has been modified and saved.

events.name: NOTE_DELETED
events.description: Signals a note has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates a record has been modified and changes are pending.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / NoteOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Description binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (display)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns to show

overridableConfigKeys.label: Faceted filters
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cell spacing
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image label binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Buttons users can click on each row

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max inline row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Meta binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (fetch)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Price binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Priority binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search placeholder
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

events.name: TASK_CREATED
events.description: A new task has been created.
events.synonyms: new task, task added, task initiation

events.name: TASK_UPDATED
events.description: Signals a task has been modified.

events.name: TASK_DELETED
events.description: Signals that a task has been removed.

events.name: DO_CREATE
events.description: Initiates the creation of a new record.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates data has been modified and should be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / TaskOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

appName.description: Product name shown in the chrome header

contentTrait.description: Trait rendered inside the app layout content area

detailSlot.description: Slot where detail/edit views render

layoutMode.description: Where the primary navigation lives in the chrome

layoutPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the application chrome

navItems.description: Top-level nav entries on the left rail

notificationClickEvent.description: Event emitted when the user picks a notification

notifications.description: Items shown in the notifications dropdown

searchEvent.description: Event emitted when the user runs a global search

topBarActions.description: Icon buttons shown on the right side of the top bar

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after metrics aggregate. Default is the canonical data-grid call mapping @entity.cards through stat-display. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (hero numbers, sparkline rows, tile splashes) to deliver entirely different KPI UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, aggregation pipeline, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Metrics
overridableConfigKeys.description: One stat card per entry; declares aggregation, format, and styling
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: list of KPI cards / stat tiles / metric cards. each entry has label / value / format / icon / variant / aggregation. user phrases: 'replace metrics with X, Y, Z' -> rewrite array; 'add Revenue tile' -> append entry; 'change KPIs to X' -> rewrite array

overridableConfigKeys.label: Stat display look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Section title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown above the stat-card grid
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: the section header text. user phrases: 'rename section to X' / 'title the KPIs X' / 'change section title to X' -> X

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to arrange the stat cards
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly

overridableConfigKeys.label: Aggregation
overridableConfigKeys.description: How values within a bucket combine into one number
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: user phrases: 'count' / 'how many' -> count; 'total' / 'sum of' -> sum; 'average' / 'mean' -> avg; 'minimum' / 'lowest' -> min; 'maximum' / 'highest' -> max

overridableConfigKeys.label: Group / categorize / bucket / split by field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field whose values become the chart's category buckets. Set this when the user voices 'group by X' / 'categorize by X' / 'bucket by X' / 'split by X' / 'break down by X' for any non-time field X (for time-units, set period + timeAxis=true instead).
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: regroup / rebucket / categorize / breakdown by / split by / segment by. user phrases: 'group by status' -> categoryField=status; 'group by region' / 'by region' -> categoryField=region; 'group by category' / 'by category' -> categoryField=category; 'group by product' / 'by product' -> categoryField=product; 'group by month' / 'by month' -> categoryField=month (when explicitly requested as a category, not a time bucket); 'split by X' / 'break down by X' / 'segment by X' / 'bucket by X' -> categoryField=X

overridableConfigKeys.label: Chart type
overridableConfigKeys.description: Visual format for the rendered chart
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: bar = vertical bars, line = connected line, pie = pie chart, donut = pie with hole, area = filled area chart, histogram = frequency distribution, scatter = XY scatter. user phrases: 'switch to donut' / 'make it a donut' / 'as a donut chart' -> donut; 'use a pie chart' -> pie; 'show as line' / 'line chart' -> line; 'as bars' / 'bar chart' -> bar

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drill event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when a user clicks a chart point
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: click-through navigation event. user phrases: 'on click navigate to X' / 'drill into X' / 'when clicked open X' -> X event name

overridableConfigKeys.label: Chart height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pixel height of the rendered chart
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: vertical size in pixels. user phrases: 'taller' / 'make it taller' / 'increase height' / 'bigger vertically' -> larger number (e.g. 300, 400); 'shorter' / 'smaller' -> smaller; 'set height to 300' / '300px tall' -> 300

overridableConfigKeys.label: Top N
overridableConfigKeys.description: Keep only the first N points after sorting (0 = all)
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: user phrases: 'top 5' -> 5; 'top 10' -> 10; 'first 3' -> 3; 'all' / 'no limit' -> 0; 'show all' -> 0

overridableConfigKeys.label: Group by month / quarter / week / day / year
overridableConfigKeys.description: Group by month, quarter, week, day, or year — the calendar bucket the chart groups data into. Set ALONGSIDE timeAxis=true whenever the user says 'group by <time-unit>' or 'by <time-unit>' or 'rebucket to <time-unit>' or 'instead of <other-time-unit>'.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: regroup / rebucket / change bucket / group differently. user phrases: 'group by month' / 'by month' / 'monthly' / 'monthly buckets' / 'switch to monthly' / 'instead of quarter' -> month; 'group by quarter' / 'by quarter' / 'quarterly' -> quarter; 'group by week' / 'by week' / 'weekly' / 'weekly buckets' -> week; 'group by day' / 'by day' / 'daily' / 'daily buckets' -> day; 'group by year' / 'by year' / 'yearly' / 'annually' -> year. Whenever the user voices 'group by <time-unit>' BOTH period AND timeAxis=true should be set.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Series
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pre-formatted multi-series spec for stacked or layered charts
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: multiple lines / bars per category. user phrases: 'compare X and Y' -> add two series entries

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show legend
overridableConfigKeys.description: Display the series legend
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: true shows the color key. user phrases: 'show legend' / 'show the legend' / 'show key' / 'with legend' / 'with a legend' -> true; 'hide legend' / 'no legend' / 'without legend' / 'remove legend' -> false

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show values
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render the numeric value on top of each data point
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: user phrases: 'show values' / 'show numbers on bars' / 'with data labels' / 'label the bars' -> true; 'hide values' / 'no labels' -> false

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sort direction
overridableConfigKeys.description: Ascending or descending order for the sort field
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: asc = ascending = lowest-to-highest = low-to-high = smallest-first. desc = descending = highest-to-lowest = high-to-low = largest-first. user phrases: 'highest to lowest' / 'largest first' / 'descending' -> desc; 'lowest to highest' / 'smallest first' / 'ascending' -> asc

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sort by
overridableConfigKeys.description: Order points by value, label, or leave unsorted
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: user phrases: 'sort by value' / 'order by amount' -> value; 'sort alphabetically' / 'sort by name' -> label; 'no sort' / 'leave order' -> none

overridableConfigKeys.label: Stacking
overridableConfigKeys.description: Stack bars, normalize to 100%, or render side-by-side
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: user phrases: 'side by side' / 'grouped' -> none; 'stacked' / 'stack the bars' -> stack; 'percent stacked' / '100% stacked' / 'normalized' -> normalize

overridableConfigKeys.label: Subtitle
overridableConfigKeys.description: Secondary line below the title
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: secondary header below the title. user phrases: 'with subtitle X' / 'set subtitle to X' -> X

overridableConfigKeys.label: Time axis
overridableConfigKeys.description: Group by timeField bucketed by period instead of categoryField
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: true means group by date / month / time. user phrases: 'group by month / week / year / date' -> set timeAxis=true; 'group by status / category' -> timeAxis=false

overridableConfigKeys.label: Date field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field used as the time axis when timeAxis is on
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: the date / timestamp / created-at column. set when timeAxis=true

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown above the chart
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: the chart's header text. user phrases: 'rename to X' / 'title it X' / 'change the title to X' / 'call it X' -> X

overridableConfigKeys.label: Value field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Numeric field aggregated per bucket (blank = row count)
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: the numeric column to aggregate. empty string counts rows. user phrases: 'sum revenue' -> valueField=revenue + aggregation=sum

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to draw the chart
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly — pattern selection is upstream

overridableConfigKeys.label: Assignee binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the assignee/owner slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Badge binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the status/badge slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Category binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the category/tag slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the responsive grid layout

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Description binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card body/subtitle slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (display)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows shown per visible page before pagination

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns to show
overridableConfigKeys.description: Each column maps to one field on the BrowseItem entity

overridableConfigKeys.label: Faceted filters
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-field filter facets ({ field, label, options }); each renders a select that fires REFETCH_FILTER to filter the list by that field. Empty = no filter bar.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cell spacing
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap size between rows (sm, md, lg)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field that holds the row thumbnail URL

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image label binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the image-area label slot (image-first variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Buttons users can click on each row

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max inline row actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Default 99 = all inline; set 2–3 for dense tables to avoid action overflow.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Meta binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page size (fetch)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rows fetched from the server per page

overridableConfigKeys.label: Price binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the price/amount overlay slot.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Priority binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the priority slot (triage / work-queue variants).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Search placeholder
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeholder text in the list's search box. Set per-domain (e.g. 'Search events…') so the box never leaks the variation name.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Title binding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-row binding string for the card title slot. Layer 3 variants read this inside their renderItem; consumers override it to point at their entity's field (e.g. "@item.dishName").

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Layout pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render slot
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI slot the modal renders into

overridableConfigKeys.label: Form fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity fields displayed as inputs in the modal form

overridableConfigKeys.label: Icon
overridableConfigKeys.description: Icon shown in the modal header

overridableConfigKeys.label: Form mode
overridableConfigKeys.description: create or edit — controls submit-button copy and validation

overridableConfigKeys.label: Modal title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading at the top of the modal

overridableConfigKeys.label: Layout pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render slot
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI slot the modal renders into

overridableConfigKeys.label: Form fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity fields displayed as inputs in the modal form

overridableConfigKeys.label: Icon
overridableConfigKeys.description: Icon shown in the modal header

overridableConfigKeys.label: Form mode
overridableConfigKeys.description: create or edit — controls submit-button copy and validation

overridableConfigKeys.label: Modal title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading at the top of the modal

overridableConfigKeys.label: Alert message
overridableConfigKeys.description: Body text explaining what the user is confirming

overridableConfigKeys.label: Confirm button
overridableConfigKeys.description: Label on the primary confirm action button

overridableConfigKeys.label: Icon
overridableConfigKeys.description: Icon name displayed in the confirmation modal header

overridableConfigKeys.label: Modal title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown at the top of the confirmation modal

events.name: WIDGET_CREATED
events.description: A new widget has been generated or added.

events.name: WIDGET_UPDATED
events.description: Signals a widget's data or appearance has been modified.

events.name: WIDGET_DELETED
events.description: Signals a widget has been removed.

events.name: DO_UPDATE
events.description: Indicates data has been modified and needs to be refreshed.

events.name: DO_DELETE
events.description: Initiates the removal of a record.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for std-generic-app / WidgetOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

collection.description: Override the persistence collection / table name. Defaults to `plural(entityName).toLowerCase()`. Use this when the user names the database/table/storage location ("save them under X", "the table is called X", "in our database it's X") — NOT when they rename the domain concept (that's `entityName`).

persistence.description: Override the entity persistence mode. `persistent` = stored in the configured backend; `runtime` = in-memory session-scoped only.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

appName.description: Product name shown in the chrome header

contentTrait.description: Trait rendered inside the app layout content area

detailSlot.description: Slot where detail/edit views render

layoutMode.description: Where the primary navigation lives in the chrome

layoutPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the application chrome

navItems.description: Top-level nav entries on the left rail

notificationClickEvent.description: Event emitted when the user picks a notification

notifications.description: Items shown in the notifications dropdown

searchEvent.description: Event emitted when the user runs a global search

topBarActions.description: Icon buttons shown on the right side of the top bar

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after metrics aggregate. Default is the canonical data-grid call mapping @entity.cards through stat-display. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (hero numbers, sparkline rows, tile splashes) to deliver entirely different KPI UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, aggregation pipeline, and listens.

metrics.description: One stat card per entry; declares aggregation, format, and styling
metrics.x-synonyms: list of KPI cards / stat tiles / metric cards. each entry has label / value / format / icon / variant / aggregation. user phrases: 'replace metrics with X, Y, Z' -> rewrite array; 'add Revenue tile' -> append entry; 'change KPIs to X' -> rewrite array

statLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.

title.description: Heading shown above the stat-card grid
title.x-synonyms: the section header text. user phrases: 'rename section to X' / 'title the KPIs X' / 'change section title to X' -> X

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to arrange the stat cards
viewPattern.x-synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

aggregation.description: How values within a bucket combine into one number
aggregation.x-synonyms: user phrases: 'count' / 'how many' -> count; 'total' / 'sum of' -> sum; 'average' / 'mean' -> avg; 'minimum' / 'lowest' -> min; 'maximum' / 'highest' -> max

categoryField.description: Entity field whose values become the chart's category buckets. Set this when the user voices 'group by X' / 'categorize by X' / 'bucket by X' / 'split by X' / 'break down by X' for any non-time field X (for time-units, set period + timeAxis=true instead).
categoryField.x-label: Group / categorize / bucket / split by field
categoryField.x-synonyms: regroup / rebucket / categorize / breakdown by / split by / segment by. user phrases: 'group by status' -> categoryField=status; 'group by region' / 'by region' -> categoryField=region; 'group by category' / 'by category' -> categoryField=category; 'group by product' / 'by product' -> categoryField=product; 'group by month' / 'by month' -> categoryField=month (when explicitly requested as a category, not a time bucket); 'split by X' / 'break down by X' / 'segment by X' / 'bucket by X' -> categoryField=X

chartType.description: Visual format for the rendered chart
chartType.x-synonyms: bar = vertical bars, line = connected line, pie = pie chart, donut = pie with hole, area = filled area chart, histogram = frequency distribution, scatter = XY scatter. user phrases: 'switch to donut' / 'make it a donut' / 'as a donut chart' -> donut; 'use a pie chart' -> pie; 'show as line' / 'line chart' -> line; 'as bars' / 'bar chart' -> bar

drillEvent.description: Event emitted when a user clicks a chart point
drillEvent.x-synonyms: click-through navigation event. user phrases: 'on click navigate to X' / 'drill into X' / 'when clicked open X' -> X event name

height.description: Pixel height of the rendered chart
height.x-synonyms: vertical size in pixels. user phrases: 'taller' / 'make it taller' / 'increase height' / 'bigger vertically' -> larger number (e.g. 300, 400); 'shorter' / 'smaller' -> smaller; 'set height to 300' / '300px tall' -> 300

limit.description: Keep only the first N points after sorting (0 = all)

period.description: Group by month, quarter, week, day, or year — the calendar bucket the chart groups data into. Set ALONGSIDE timeAxis=true whenever the user says 'group by <time-unit>' or 'by <time-unit>' or 'rebucket to <time-unit>' or 'instead of <other-time-unit>'.
period.x-label: Group by month / quarter / week / day / year
period.x-synonyms: regroup / rebucket / change bucket / group differently. user phrases: 'group by month' / 'by month' / 'monthly' / 'monthly buckets' / 'switch to monthly' / 'instead of quarter' -> month; 'group by quarter' / 'by quarter' / 'quarterly' -> quarter; 'group by week' / 'by week' / 'weekly' / 'weekly buckets' -> week; 'group by day' / 'by day' / 'daily' / 'daily buckets' -> day; 'group by year' / 'by year' / 'yearly' / 'annually' -> year. Whenever the user voices 'group by <time-unit>' BOTH period AND timeAxis=true should be set.

series.description: Pre-formatted multi-series spec for stacked or layered charts
series.x-synonyms: multiple lines / bars per category. user phrases: 'compare X and Y' -> add two series entries

showLegend.x-synonyms: true shows the color key. user phrases: 'show legend' / 'show the legend' / 'show key' / 'with legend' / 'with a legend' -> true; 'hide legend' / 'no legend' / 'without legend' / 'remove legend' -> false

showValues.description: Render the numeric value on top of each data point
showValues.x-synonyms: user phrases: 'show values' / 'show numbers on bars' / 'with data labels' / 'label the bars' -> true; 'hide values' / 'no labels' -> false

sortDir.description: Ascending or descending order for the sort field
sortDir.x-synonyms: asc = ascending = lowest-to-highest = low-to-high = smallest-first. desc = descending = highest-to-lowest = high-to-low = largest-first. user phrases: 'highest to lowest' / 'largest first' / 'descending' -> desc; 'lowest to highest' / 'smallest first' / 'ascending' -> asc

sortField.description: Order points by value, label, or leave unsorted
sortField.x-synonyms: user phrases: 'sort by value' / 'order by amount' -> value; 'sort alphabetically' / 'sort by name' -> label; 'no sort' / 'leave order' -> none

stack.description: Stack bars, normalize to 100%, or render side-by-side
stack.x-synonyms: user phrases: 'side by side' / 'grouped' -> none; 'stacked' / 'stack the bars' -> stack; 'percent stacked' / '100% stacked' / 'normalized' -> normalize

subtitle.x-synonyms: secondary header below the title. user phrases: 'with subtitle X' / 'set subtitle to X' -> X

timeAxis.description: Group by timeField bucketed by period instead of categoryField
timeAxis.x-synonyms: true means group by date / month / time. user phrases: 'group by month / week / year / date' -> set timeAxis=true; 'group by status / category' -> timeAxis=false

timeField.description: Entity field used as the time axis when timeAxis is on
timeField.x-synonyms: the date / timestamp / created-at column. set when timeAxis=true

title.description: Heading shown above the chart
title.x-synonyms: the chart's header text. user phrases: 'rename to X' / 'title it X' / 'change the title to X' / 'call it X' -> X

valueField.description: Numeric field aggregated per bucket (blank = row count)
valueField.x-synonyms: the numeric column to aggregate. empty string counts rows. user phrases: 'sum revenue' -> valueField=revenue + aggregation=sum

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to draw the chart
viewPattern.x-synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly — pattern selection is upstream

fields.name: searchTerm
fields.description: The user's search query string.

fields.name: centerLat
fields.description: Latitude coordinate of the search center.

fields.name: centerLng
fields.description: The longitude coordinate of the search center.

fields.name: radiusKm
fields.description: The search radius in kilometers.

fields.name: boundsNorth
fields.description: Northern boundary coordinate of the search area.

fields.name: boundsSouth
